raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1095 removes legal barriers that prevent Californians from switching their home appliances from gas to electric.",
    "Enabling the switch to electric appliances can improve the health and coziness of buildings and homes.",
    "The Cozy Homes Cleanup Act aims to help California achieve its climate goals by facilitating the transition to zero-emission appliances.",
    "The state has set a target of deploying 6 million new heat pumps by 2030.",
    "Residential buildings account for eight percent of greenhouse gas emissions in California.",
    "SB 1095 streamlines the process for installing zero-emission appliances.",
    "The legislation authorizes the California Housing and Community Development Department to update standards for appliance installations in mobile and manufactured homes.",
    "The law prevents Home Owner Associations from blocking residents from switching from gas to electric appliances."
  ]
}
```
